description_long: This is a rectangular, freestanding wooden cabinet with a natural, light brown finish and a simple, modern design. The front features two vertical doors with slim, metallic handles, providing access to the interior storage space. The left side of the cabinet is uniquely designed with a series of open, diamond-shaped cubby holes, likely intended for storing bottles or other cylindrical objects. The top, sides, and back are flat and unadorned, emphasizing the utilitarian and minimalist aesthetic. The cabinet appears sturdy and is likely constructed from solid or composite wood panels. No visible contents are present, and the overall appearance suggests it is suitable for use in urban environments such as offices, garages, or communal spaces.
description: A modern, light brown wooden cabinet with two front doors and metallic handles, featuring open diamond-shaped cubbies on one side. Its minimalist design is both functional and visually distinctive.
description_view_0: Front view showing two vertical doors with metallic handles and the open diamond-shaped cubby holes on the left side.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain, flat wooden surface with the edge of the cubby holes just visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a completely flat, unadorned wooden panel with no visible features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a plain wooden surface and no cubby holes visible.
